articles.title: TOYOTA RACING aiming for Le Mans victory
articles.description: TORONTO, June 9, 2026 – TOYOTA RACING will challenge for its sixth victory – and fulfilment of its new For the Engineering Race slogan – in the Le Mans 24 Hours on 13-14 June with the TR010 HYBRID Hypercar.
